prs.title: update with master
fix: pin 9 actions to commit SHA
fix(editor): ensure font picker font names are not quoted
feat(editor): deselect on esc
feat(editor): support mermaid staate diagrams
fix(math): correctly validate second point in isLineSegment
fix: Rotated rounded arrow center point
fix: Other endpoint is not immediately updated on midpoint snap
chore(packages/excalidraw): export Fonts helper class
fix: Arrow point index Out-of-Bounds
feat(editor): various text related improvements
feat(editor): put caret at pointer coords when clicking on selected text element
fix(editor): remove leftover debug code path
chore(editor): bump @excalidraw/mermaid-to-excalidraw@2.1.1
fix(editor): arrowhead picker overflowing viewport
feat(editor): ERD arrowheads and diagrams
feat(packages/excalidraw): tweak and expose more API around state and lifecycle
docs(packages/excalidraw): improve readme
feat(packages/excalidraw): state tracking, api hook, and others
fix(editor): call throttleRAF with lastArgs and remove trailing
feat(packages/excalidraw): export throttleRAF
fix(editor): do not conditionally disable midpoint snapping menu preference
feat(editor): sync export theme with ui theme
fix: dropdownMenu item badge position
feat(editor): mermaid code editor & improve parsing
feat(editor): Arrow binding is a preference
fix(editor): disable snap-to-midpoint menu item when arrow-binding disabled
fix(editor): Multi-point arrow bound point update
fix(editor): simplify and fix midpoint highlighting
fix(editor): "hand" tool active after exiting view mode if laser point was used
fix(editor): spacing in the left menu
feat(editor): support radar chart and multiple series for other chart types
fix(editor): Hardened fixed point and bound element parsing in restore
chore(debug): add debug.logChanged() and make easy to import
feat(editor): allow laser-pointing in view mode
feat(editor): visualize binding midpoints + support for simple arrows
chore: Update translations from Crowdin
feat: TextToDiagram v2
feat: add qr code to live session share dialog.
fix: reconciliation of server updates & refactor restore
feat: stop using CSS filters for dark mode (static canvas)
chore: Update translations from Crowdin
fix: rerender TTD preview on message remove
fix: ttd 429 error handling
fix: keep input focus during generation
fix: tweak error display in ttd
refactor: change TTD persistence to iDB
fix: retries and related UX fixes
fix: Regression - invert SVGs in Dark Mode
fix: set link icon opacity based on element opacity
fix: dropdownMenu item badge position
fix: Angle-locked line history
fix: Arrow drag start in bindable area  jumps across bindable
fix: fail gracefully during restore
feat: reduce max tablet MQ size
perf: Cache hits in collision detection
fix: Elbow end point disconnect
fix: Curve endpoint intersection
fix: update wysiwyg color on theme change
fix: grid color in dark mode
fix: Coherent stats binding
feat(packages/excalidraw): export CommandPalette
feat: support customizing TTD welcome screen
fix: Increase iteration on curve intersection calc
fix: Arrow endpoint offset
fix: Bound arrow elements for distribute and wyswig updates
fix: Clarify welcome screen message about browser storage limitations
fix: convert ArrowheadNoneIcon to component matching arrowhead icon pattern
fix: update arrowhead property defaultValue handling
fix: hex8 regression #10578
fix: Inside-inside bound arrow endpoint drag trigger focus point editor
fix: Other binding converted from fixed to orbit unconditionally
fix: Arrow update when cloned
fix: Arrow overlap arrow behavior
fix: SVG Inversion on Safari
feat: prevent pasting excalidraw into textarea & paste element text if avail
feat: Focus indicator
fix(editor): On focus drag only update other binding if it's orbit
fix(editor): copying to clipboard with no ClipboardEvent
fix(editor): crop editor cursor drift
fix(editor): image positioning in crop editor
feat(editor): reduce binding gap
feat(editor): support embedding google drive videos
feat(editor): allow clicking on links and embeds with laser tool
feat(app): add preferences to main menu
feat(packages/excalidraw): support nested dropdown menu

feat: move visualdebug to utils and introduce volume bindable visualization
refactor: update SCSS syntax & remove open-color dep
fix: sentry CI worfklow

fix: add constants and side methods to packages

fix: Box selection of arrows

fix: Ctrl/Alt elbow arrow jumps
style: remove blue lines

fix: Frame and Frame Element binding highlight offset
fix: do not finalize multi-point lines if binding not enabled
fix: Corner jumping & hints
feat: Non-elbow arrow snapping and behavior changes
fix: rounded left and top clipped image export to SVG
feat: switch between basic shapes
fix: prevent translation of excalidraw container

merge upstream changes
